name: G-6 source-file validator: --check id-prefix mode verifies every rule id in _operator/<org>/ is prefixed with the org name per §2.22
command:
mkdir -p _operator/my-org && printf 'source:
  id: my-org-rules
rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
' > _operator/my-org/conventions.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-source-file.sh" --file "$PWD/_operator/my-org/conventions.yaml" --check id-prefix 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'lacks org prefix' err.txt && echo prefix_enforced 1>&2
